Uses of Package
com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.grammar

Packages that use com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.grammar
Package
Description
com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.api
Contains the core API to be used to implement checks.
com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.grammar
Contains the grammar used by the Checkstyle framework.
  • Classes in com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.grammar used by com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.api
    Class
    Description
    CommentListener
    This interface is used to be notified by parser about comments in the parsed code.
  • Classes in com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.grammar used by com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.grammar
    Class
    Description
    SimpleToken
    A simple wrapper for ANTLR Token that provides a proper SimpleToken.equals(Object) and SimpleToken.hashCode() implementation based on the token's type and text.
